Home»Sport»Paris Olympics: Times Team SA athletes are in action on Tuesday

Take note of all the times Team SA athletes will be in action at the ongoing Paris Olympics on Tuesday, 30 July.

On Monday, the major highlight from the day’s action for Team SA was thegold medal performanceofTatjana Smithin the 100m breaststroke at theaction-packedParis Olympics.

Enjoy the Paris Olympic Games 2024 experience at your favourite ATKV Resort!

Earlier in the day,Alan Hatherlyimpressively alsobagged another medalfor Team SA.

The women’s surfing third round heat between Sarah Baum and Clarissa Moore was postponed in Teahupo’o, while the men’s triathlon was also rescheduled until Wednesday.

SURFING

Women’s third round: POSTPONEDSarah Baum vs Clarissa Moore

TRIATHLON

Men’s Individual: POSTPONEDJamie Riddlle and Henri Schoeman

CYCLING (BMX)

Men’s park qualification (15:10)Vincent Leygonie

HOCKEY

Men’s Pool A (10:30):Team SA vs Germany

ROWING

Women’s single sculls, quarter-finals (10:00):Paige Badenhorst

SWIMMING

Men’s 200m butterfly, heats (11:03):Matthew Sates

Men’s 200m butterfly, semi-finals (20:32):Matthew Sates TBC

RUGBY SEVENS

Women’s 11th/12th pace playoff (16:30): Team SA vs Fiji

IT support is not just technical, it is personal.

Liema Pantsi’s victory was clouded as fans of the ‘Big Brother Mzansi’ show expressed that Smash Afrika was unprofessional towards her.
